mapper.select:
SELECT wp.wp_id as wpId, wp.wp_name as wpName, wp.wp_type as wpTypeNo, wt.wp_type_name as wpType, wp.wp_img as wpImg,
wt.wp_type_content as wpTypeContent, glog.glog_date as lastGlogDate FROM workplace wp LEFT OUTER JOIN wp_type wt ON wp.wp_type = wt.wp_type_no LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT glog.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY glog.glog_wpid ORDER BY glog.glog_date desc ) AS rn FROM ghp_log glog ) WHERE rn = 1 ) glog ON wp.wp_id = glog.glog_wpid
WHERE upper(wp.WP_ID) = upper(#{wpId})
select count(*) from ghp_log glog where upper(glog.glog_wpid) = upper(#{wpId})

SELECT glog.glog_id glogId, glog.glog_date glogDate, glog.glog_worker glogWorker, E.emp_name glogWName, glog.glog_value glogValue, glog.glog_result glogResult, glog.glog_action glogAction, glog.glog_adate glogAdate, glog.glog_img glogImg, glog.glog_memo glogMemo, glog.glog_cdate glogCdate, glog.glog_whid glogWhId, glog.glog_wpid glogWpId, ghp.ghp_id ghpId, ghp.ghp_name ghpName, ghp.ghp_category ghpCategory, ghp.ghp_standard ghpStandard, ghp.ghp_check_method ghpCheckMethod, ghp.ghp_cycle ghpCycle, ghp.ghp_wh_type ghpWhType, ghp.ghp_wp_type ghpWpType, ghp.GHP_MIN_VALUE ghpMinValue, ghp.GHP_MAX_VALUE ghpMaxValue, ghp.ghp_unit ghpUnit FROM ghp_log glog LEFT OUTER JOIN GHP ghp ON glog.GLOG_GHP = ghp.GHP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP E ON glog.GLOG_WORKER = E.EMP_ID WHERE upper(glog.glog_wpid) = upper(#{wpId})
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'WP' || WP_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO WORKPLACE (WP_ID, WP_NAME, WP_TYPE, WP_USAGE) VALUES (#{wpId}, #{wpName}, #{wpType}, 'Y')
